intended_use_full: HipCheck assists the surgeon to determine quantitative measurements for femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) procedures. HipCheck provides static localization information derived from image processing of intra-operatively acquired static fluoroscopic images, by superposition of virtual measurement tools onto those X-ray images for skeletally mature patients. HipMap FAI Analysis is a patient-specific report used to support surgeon or radiologist pre-operative clinical decision making. HipMap femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) Analysis provides a morphological analysis of a skeletally mature hip with potential FAI, including measurements and visualizations that describe hip impingement and stability.
ground_truth: Images labeled by two trained personnel using software for labeling the femur with precise location of femoral head and neck; testing conducted against the average value of the two taggers
other_metrics: Hip detection: 90% Lower Bound of 97.5%; Head center X coordinate within +3.3%/-3.5%; Head center Y coordinate within +3.8%/-4.8%; Neck Angle relative to vertical within +13.63°/-15.35°
